_notes.note_guardian_favor: Guardian's Favor (2r) reduces Hand of Protection cooldown by 60s/rank AND increases Hand of Freedom duration by 3s/rank. Split into two entries (id=222 and id=223).
_notes.note_no_shared_bits: No shared Paladin family marker bits identified across all 14 verified carrier spells. No exclusions required.

talent_affixes.name: Divinity
talent_affixes.notes: All healing done and received +1%/rank. All-ones matches every Paladin family spell. Carrier DA(465) confirmed Paladin family via spellinfo.

talent_affixes._todo: Divine Strength (5r, tier 1) — Increases total Strength by 3/6/9/12/15%. Passive stat bonus, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Devotion Aura
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[64,0,32]: DA(465) mask0 bit6(0x40=64)|mask2 bit5(0x20=32). mask2 bit5 appears unique to DA among verified Paladin spells. Devotion Aura armor EFFECT1 +17%/rank. Healing bonus portion of the talent (aura-based) not captured here.

talent_affixes.name: Guardian's Favor
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[128,0,0]=0x80 (mask0 bit7). No shared Paladin marker bits. Hand of Protection cooldown -60s/rank. See id=223 for the Hand of Freedom duration half of this talent.

talent_affixes.name: Guardian's Favor
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[16,0,0]=0x10 (mask0 bit4). No shared Paladin marker bits. Hand of Freedom duration +3s/rank. Second half of Guardian's Favor — see id=222 for the Hand of Protection cooldown half.

talent_affixes._todo: Toughness (5r, tier 2) — Increases armor value from equipped items by 2/4/6/8/10%. Passive armor stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Blessing of Kings (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Hammer of Justice
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2048,0,0]=0x800 (mask0 bit11). No shared Paladin marker bits. HoJ cooldown -10s/rank (verify exact in-game value; WotLK base HoJ CD is 40s).

talent_affixes._todo: Divine Sacrifice (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Improved Righteous Fury (3r, tier 4) — While RF is active, reduces damage taken by 2/4/6% and increases threat generated by RF. Aura-conditional damage reduction, not implementable as SpellMod.
Shield of the Templar (3r, tier 4) — Grants Holy Shield, Avenger's Shield, and Shield of Righteousness a 33/66/100% chance to silence the target. Proc/chance mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.
Anticipation (5r, tier 4) — Increases dodge rating by 10/20/30/40/50. Passive rating stat, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Sacred Duty
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[4194304,0,0]=0x400000 (mask0 bit22). No shared Paladin marker bits. Divine Shield cooldown -60s/rank. Stamina bonus portion of Sacred Duty not captured here.

talent_affixes._todo: One-Handed Weapon Specialization (3r, tier 5) — Increases all damage dealt by 2/4/6% while wielding a one-handed weapon. Weapon-type conditional melee modifier, not implementable as SpellMod.
Spiritual Attunement (2r, tier 5) — Gives 5/10% of mana when healed. Mana-on-heal proc, not implementable as SpellMod.
Holy Shield (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Ardent Defender (5r, tier 6) — When below 35% health, damage taken is reduced by 6/12/18/24/30%. HP-threshold conditional mitigation, not implementable as SpellMod.
Redoubt (2r, tier 6) — Increases block value by 15/30% when you block. Proc-based block value bonus, not implementable as SpellMod.
Combat Expertise (3r, tier 7) — Increases expertise by 3/6/10 and total health by 2/4/6%. Passive stat bonuses, not implementable as SpellMod.
Touched by the Light (3r, tier 7) — Increases spell power by 20/40/60% of Stamina. Passive stat conversion (Stamina → SP), not implementable as SpellMod.
Guarded by the Light (2r, tier 7) — Reduces spell damage taken by 3/6% and makes Divine Plea undispellable. Complex damage reduction and aura interaction, not implementable as SpellMod.
Judgements of the Wise (verify rank count and effect) — If proc-based mana return, not implementable as SpellMod.
Avenger's Shield (1r, tier 8) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Shield of Righteousness (1r, tier 9) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Divine Guardian (2r, tier 9) — Increases the radius of Divine Sacrifice and reduces damage taken by party/raid members by 10/20%. Aura effect, not implementable as SpellMod.
Hammer of the Righteous (1r, tier 10) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
